summary: Frontend testing for global color and button state system. Most theme color features work correctly (primary colors, icons, process steps). Found hardcoded blue colors in App.css overriding theme-aware styles in index.css for btn-secondary border, btn-primary box-shadow, and reference-card hover border.

ui_bugs.issue: Border uses hardcoded rgba(0, 86, 210, 0.2) instead of theme color
box-shadow uses hardcoded rgba(0, 86, 210, 0.1) and hover shadow uses rgba(0, 86, 210, 0.25)
Border uses hardcoded rgba(0, 86, 210, 0.3) instead of theme color
Border uses hardcoded rgba(0, 86, 210, 0.2) instead of theme color

passed_tests: CSS variable --color-primary correctly set to #0891B2 (teal from admin)
btn-primary background uses theme color rgb(8, 145, 178)
btn-primary text is white (rgb(255, 255, 255)) - good visibility
btn-primary has correct font-weight 600 and border-radius 8px
btn-secondary text uses theme color rgb(8, 145, 178)
text-primary elements use theme color rgb(8, 145, 178)
icon-bg-primary uses theme color with 10% transparency
process-step-number background uses theme color rgb(8, 145, 178)
process-step-number box-shadow uses theme color with 30% transparency
Admin panel theme picker shows #0891B2 as selected color
Admin panel color picker buttons work correctly
Theme color changes saved in admin panel
Service page /tasoitustyot-helsinki uses correct theme color throughout
Spinners use .spinner-theme class with theme color (verified in CSS)
Selection cards use theme color for selected state border
action_items: Remove or update conflicting styles in /app/frontend/src/App.css that override theme-aware styles in index.css
Replace hardcoded rgba(0, 86, 210, X) colors with color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary) X%, transparent)
Specifically fix: btn-secondary border (line 33), btn-primary box-shadow (lines 18, 23), service-card:hover border (line 70), reference-card:hover border (line 87)
critical_code_review_comments: App.css contains legacy hardcoded blue (#0056D2) colors that override the proper theme-aware styles in index.css
CSS specificity/order issue: App.css is imported after index.css so its styles take precedence
Consider removing duplicate btn-primary and btn-secondary definitions from App.css since index.css has the correct theme-aware versions
The box-shadow colors for buttons should use color-mix() or CSS variables instead of hardcoded RGBA values

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Most theme features work, but 4 style issues with hardcoded colors

context_for_next_testing_agent: The theme color system (--color-primary CSS variable) works correctly. Issues are in App.css which has legacy hardcoded blue colors that override the theme-aware styles in index.css. Main fixes needed in App.css lines 18, 23, 33, 70, 87. After fix, verify btn-secondary border, btn-primary box-shadow, service-card:hover border, and reference-card:hover border all use theme color.

root_cause_analysis.issue: Hardcoded blue colors in UI elements
root_cause_analysis.root_cause: App.css contains legacy styles with hardcoded rgba(0, 86, 210, X) values that were not updated when the theme system was implemented in index.css
root_cause_analysis.fix_approach: Either remove conflicting styles from App.css (since index.css has correct versions) or update App.css to use color-mix(in srgb, var(--color-primary) X%, transparent)
